level_signals: Comp range $74,800–$110,000 consistent with entry-to-mid level IC
No explicit years of experience requirement stated

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Build – Bring structure to undefined opportunities by creating and implementing high-impact playbooks, models, processes, and tools that help us grow new business more quickly and effectively
Influence – Work cross-functionally with our Business Development, Logistics, and operations teams to rapidly scale new business
Prioritize – Understand the needs of our partners, prioritize those needs by impact, assess tradeoffs, and design solutions to drive both speed and quality outcomes
Analyze – Solve key problems with a data-driven, first-principles approach (identification, sizing, pricing, impact, root causing, trade offs)
Act with urgency and take ownership; you quickly jump on the most important issues and you are capable of driving multiple work streams simultaneously
Have strong cross-functional skills and experience with projects spanning multiple teams
You are organized and appreciate the importance of following process and thorough documentation

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have previous experience working in eCommerce and/or logistics
Are curious about the business and how things work; you ask great questions and are not afraid to challenge the status-quo

scope.surface: DoorDash Drive GTM implementation team supporting new verticals (restaurants, grocers, retailers)
scope.business_model: B2B platform / marketplace — merchant-facing logistics and delivery enablement
core_responsibilities: Drive cohesive launch strategy and execution playbook for a new business line
Build models, create documents, and implement processes to win deals and accelerate launches
Perform comprehensive analysis and make insightful recommendations about business strategy
Work cross-functionally to rapidly scale new business
Become an expert on product, operations, and Merchants

green_flags: Clear team context and business mandate (DoorDash Drive, new verticals)
Comprehensive benefits package described including parental leave and 401(k) matching
Role is on a high-growth, fast-paced team with visible business impact
Inclusive hiring statement and accommodations process mentioned
red_flags: Location type is ambiguous — JD mentions NYC-specific AEDT notice and also implies remote eligibility but does not clearly specify hybrid vs. remote vs. onsite for this role
No minimum years of experience stated, making it unclear what seniority level is truly expected
No equity mentioned despite being a tech company role
